instructions: Execute every phase below. Produce the deliverable files at the exact paths in deliverable_paths. The JSON result file is just a status report back to the main thread — the real outputs are the .pptx and .mp4 files.

phases.name: Environment Setup
steps: Create C:/Users/xsj70/make24-demo/ with subdirs: src/, screenshots/, deliverables/
pip install anthropic python-dotenv python-pptx Pillow
Try: pip install edge-tts moviepy — note result, do not abort if they fail
Check: ffmpeg -version — note result
Load ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from C:/Users/xsj70/GuildOS/.env.local or environment. If missing, write failed result and stop.

phases.name: Build Make 24 Solver
steps: Write C:/Users/xsj70/make24-demo/src/make24.py
Solver: recursive brute-force over all permutations and operator combinations
Input: 4 integers as CLI args. Output: expression = 24, or 'No solution found.'
Handle division by zero with try/except
Self-review before saving

phases.name: Run Tests
steps: Run 4 test cases via subprocess:
TEST_1: [4, 7, 8, 2]  — expects solution
TEST_2: [1, 1, 1, 1]  — expects no solution
TEST_3: [6, 6, 6, 6]  — expects solution
TEST_4: [3, 3, 8, 8]  — expects solution
Record actual output, expected, PASS/FAIL
Save to C:/Users/xsj70/make24-demo/results.json

phases.name: Generate HTML Cards
steps: For each test, write C:/Users/xsj70/make24-demo/screenshots/TEST_N.html
Dark VS Code theme: background #1e1e1e, monospace, 1200px wide
Show: test ID, inputs, command line, output, PASS/FAIL badge in matching colour

phases.name: Screenshot HTML Cards
steps: Install playwright if not present: pip install playwright && playwright install chromium
Screenshot each HTML file to C:/Users/xsj70/make24-demo/screenshots/TEST_N.png at 1280x800
If playwright fails, create simple fallback PNGs using Pillow (white bg, black text) — do not abort

phases.name: Generate PowerPoint Report
steps: Use python-pptx to build a test report presentation
Slides: (1) title + overall pass/fail, (2-5) one per test with screenshot + annotation, (6) summary table
Dark theme: slide bg #1e1e1e, text white/grey, PASS=green #4ec9b0, FAIL=red #f44747
Save to BOTH C:/Users/xsj70/make24-demo/deliverables/test-report.pptx AND C:/Users/xsj70/Downloads/make24-test-report.pptx

phases.name: Generate Narrated Video
steps: If edge-tts and moviepy are available:
- Use the Anthropic API (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) to generate a 2-3 sentence voiceover script for each test case
- Synthesise audio with edge-tts voice en-US-GuyNeural
- Assemble: intro card + 4 test screenshot clips with audio + outro card
- Save to BOTH C:/Users/xsj70/make24-demo/deliverables/demo-video.mp4 AND C:/Users/xsj70/Downloads/make24-demo-video.mp4
If not available: skip and note in result
